login.tagline: Join the early adopter program. Earn tokens, invite friends, and become a founder before the official launch on January 1, 2028.
login.note: By continuing you agree to the Whitepaper and confirm you are 13+.

dash.founderDesc: You joined before launch — you receive priority rewards and a higher reward multiplier forever.

claim.emptyHistory: No claims yet — claim your first reward today!
claim.boostMiningDesc: Boost your mining to get an extra multiplier for one hour.

ref.title: Invite & Earn Big
ref.intro: Share your link. Earn NDOG across 3 levels of referrals — forever.
ref.empty: No referrals yet — share your link to grow your network.

wp.title: NileDogs Whitepaper
wp.subtitle: Read the full vision, tokenomics, and roadmap.
wp.q2: Early Adopter Program: Founder Badge + 1.5× reward multiplier for life.
wp.q3: Distribution: 60% community, 15% team (4y vest), 10% liquidity, 10% partnerships, 5% reserve.
wp.q5: Anti-Fraud: Device fingerprint + rate limiting + admin review.

modal.bannedDesc: Your account has been suspended for violating community rules. Contact support if you believe this is a mistake.
